purpose: One active route for school launch after chat/repo migrations.

codex_campaign_authoring.prompt: Read and execute this repo task file: operations/gpt_handoff/CODEX_TASK_SCHOOL_100K_USEFUL_CAMPAIGN_GENERATOR_V1.md
codex_campaign_authoring.boundary: Codex authors campaign material only; output CODEX_DRAFT until GPT/operator validation.

local_candidate_generation.boundary: Generates candidates/staging only. This is not absorption/digest.

streaming_staging.boundary: Validates/streams ready atoms. active_memory_mutated must remain false.

later_absorption_digest.boundary: Separate later process. Requires backup/validator/rollback and memory weight guard.

explicitly_not_active: manual GPT-authored 100k campaign pack unless Owner explicitly changes route
